d: Marilee leaps up to [[2]] tiles in any direction, shooting the 2 closest enemies to her initial tile and dealing [[125%]]<ATK> damage to them.
Leaps up to [[3]] tiles.
Increases damage to [[135%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[145%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[155%]]<ATK>.
Marilee briefly charges up her next normal attack after every 2 normal attacks, dealing [[160%]]<ATK> damage and stunning the target for [[0.5]]s.
Increases damage to [[170%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[180%]]<ATK>.
Increases damage to [[190%]]<ATK>.
Marilee increases ATK by [[4%]] and ATK SPD by [[25]] when there's no enemy within [[2]] tiles.
Increases ATK by [[11%]].
Increases ATK by [[14%]].
Increases ATK by [[17%]].
Increases Crit DMG Boost by [[30]] during battle.
Increases Crit DMG Boost by [[40]] during battle.
Increases Crit DMG Boost by [[50]] during battle.
Marilee increases her ATK by [[5%]] when allies cast an Ultimate, up to [[6]] stacks. Her normal attacks deal true damage after reaching max stacks.
Gains an extra stack of Battlefield Learning when Hyperfocus takes effect for every [[10]]s.
Increases each stack of ATK bonus to [[7.5%]].
Increases each stack of ATK bonus to [[8.5%]].
Marilee reduces the required no-enemy range for triggering Hyperfocus by [[-1]] tile.
